allow: Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\('assets/happy-webp-kibun.webp'\); print\(f'Format: {img.format}'\); print\(f'Mode: {img.mode}'\); print\(f'Size: {img.size}'\); print\(f'Has alpha: {\\"A\\" in img.mode}'\); print\(f'Is animated: {getattr\(img, \\"is_animated\\", False\)}'\); print\(f'Frames: {getattr\(img, \\"n_frames\\", 1\)}'\)")
